title: Food and nutrition legislation, guidelines and policies: Policies - Canada.ca
content:
## Food and nutrition legislation, guidelines and policies: Policies
- Regulatory  initiatives
Health Canada creates policies to describe its position on an issue.
- Infant formula and human milk fortifiers
- Policy for issuing an interim letter of no objection (iLONO) for a food processing aid
- Joint Interim Policy Statement: Enforcement of Section 37 of the Food and Drugs Act as it pertains to the export of packaged food
- Food labelling coordination
- Policy for labelling and advertising of dietary fibre-containing food products
- Policy on Listeria monocytogenes in ready-to-eat foods (2023) What we heard: Consultations on the policy on Listeria monocytogenes in ready-to-eat foods Validation of ready-to-eat foods for changing the classification of a category 1 into a category 2A or 2B food in relation to Health Canada's Policy on Listeria monocytogenes in Ready-to-Eat Foods (2011) Listeria monocytogenes challenge testing of refrigerated ready-to-eat foods
- What we heard: Consultations on the policy on Listeria monocytogenes in ready-to-eat foods
- Validation of ready-to-eat foods for changing the classification of a category 1 into a category 2A or 2B food in relation to Health Canada's Policy on Listeria monocytogenes in Ready-to-Eat Foods (2011)
- Listeria monocytogenes challenge testing of refrigerated ready-to-eat foods
- Guidelines for the development of challenge test studies for Clostridium botulinum in RTE foods
- Policy on managing health risk associated with the consumption of sprouted seeds and beans
- Policy on specified risk material (SRM) in the food supply

## Infant formula and human milk fortifiers
- Interim policy on the importation and sale of infant formulas, human milk fortifiers and dietary products for the treatment of inborn errors of metabolism to mitigate shortages
- Food Directorate interim policy on foods from cloned animals
- Interim policy on the use of expired interim marketing authorizations related to food fortification
- Interim policy statement on foods for special dietary use for inherited metabolic disorders
- Interim policy statement on the nutrition labelling of prepackaged human milk
- Interim policy statements on certain front-of-package nutrition labelling requirements
- Interim policy statement on rounding rules: Item 18of the table to B.29.002 of the Food and Drug Regulations related to manner ofexpression of certain supplemental ingredients
